questionHtml: Identify the type of interaction that must be overcome when liquid ethyne vaporizes.
markschemeHtml:
London/dispersion/instantaneous dipole-induced dipole forces  [✔]

 

Note: Do not accept just “intermolecular forces” or “van der Waals’ forces”.

meta.title: Identify the type of interaction that must be overcome when liquid ethyne vaporizes.
